title: Job creation modal — services, addresses, and scheduling sections
keyConstraints: No inline styles — CSS Modules only. No UI component libraries. Conditional rendering based on jobType prop.
description: Add ServicesSection, AddressSection, and SchedulingSection to JobCreateModal. Sections render conditionally based on selected job type.
acceptanceCriteria: ServicesSection renders checkboxes: Delivery, Pickup/collection, Installation, Removal/disposal, Assembly, Other (Other shows free-text input when checked). Defaults pre-selected based on jobType.

AddressSection renders one address block for INSTALLATION and SERVICE; two blocks (pickup + delivery) for DELIVERY_AND_PICKUP; single delivery block for DELIVERY; single pickup block for PICKUP. Each block: street, postalCode, city (required), floorStair, doorCode, accessNotes (optional).

SchedulingSection renders a 3-option segment control: Exact time | Time window | TBC. Exact time: date + start time. Time window: date + window start + window end. TBC: required schedulingNote text input. Default: TBC.
Switching jobType updates address layout and pre-selected services without clearing already-typed data in unchanged fields
All section state lifted to JobCreateModal
implementationNotes: Segment control: styled radio inputs or button group in CSS Modules
Date inputs: type='date', time inputs: type='time'
schedulingNote maps to existing backend field; scheduledStart/End map to existing DateTime fields
Required field validation on submit only — no live validation
